suppress)
Iterable
CriteriaDescriptor
CriteriaSetDescriptor)
NoCommon)
	MatchName)
ObjClass)
PolicyQuery)
match_regex
match_regex_or_setc
ObjClassQueryaO
    Query object classes.
    Parameter:
    policy          The policy to query.
    Keyword Parameters/Class attributes:
    name            The name of the object set to match.
    name_regex      If true, regular expression matching will
                    be used for matching the name.
    common          The name of the inherited common to match.
    common_regex    If true, regular expression matching will
                    be used for matching the common name.
    perms           The permissions to match.
    perms_equal     If true, only commons with permission sets
                    that are equal to the criteria will
                    match.  Otherwise, any intersection
                    will match.
    perms_regex     If true, regular expression matching
                    will be used on the permission names instead
                    of set logic.
                    comparison will not be used.
    perms_indirect  If false, permissions inherited from a common
                    permission set not will be evaluated.  Default
                    is true.
    
common_regexZ
lookup_commonF
perms_regex
perms_equalT
perms_indirectN)
returnc
superr
__init__
loggingZ	getLogger
__name__
log)
self
policy
kwargs
	__class__
;/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/setools/objclassquery.pyr
ObjClassQuery.__init__c
s\qL|
z3Generator which yields all matching object classes.z/Generating object class results from {0.policy}z-Common: {0.common!r}, regex: {0.common_regex}z[Perms: {0.perms}, regex: {0.perms_regex}, eq: {0.perms_equal}, indirect: {0.perms_indirect}N)
